name: aurora-ai-package-info
title: Aurora AI Package Info
author: jmagar <https://github.com/jmagar>
description: Aurora-native package info parity surface from AI Elements.
docs:
Aurora block that expects `aurora-tokens` to be installed first.

Default install target: `@components/aurora/ai/package-info.tsx`.

Registry dependencies: `aurora-tokens`, `aurora-ai-elements`.
